2604.23398.title: When Corrective Hints Hurt: Prompt Design in Reasoner-Guided Repair of LLM Overcaution on Entailed Negations under OWL~2~DL
2604.23398.paper_summary: We report a reproducible error pattern in GPT-5.4 on OWL~2~DL compliance queries: the model frequently answers ``unknown'' when the reasoner-entailed answer is ``no'' under \emph{FunctionalProperty} closure or class \emph{disjointness}. Using 180 reasoner-audited queries from a procedural expansion of the observed pattern plus 18 hand-authored held-out queries in two unrelated domains (insurance and clinical), we compare four interaction modes under matched query budget: single-shot, three rounds of generic ``you-are-wrong'' retry, three rounds of reasoner-verdict repair with an open-world-assumption (OWA) hint, and the same repair without the hint. Direct faithfulness is 43.9\,\% (Wilson 95\,\% CI $[36.8,51.2]$); generic retry reaches 81.7\,\% ($[75.4,86.6]$); the verdict-with-hint variant is \emph{worse} at 67.2\,\% ($[60.1,73.7]$); the verdict-only variant reaches 97.8\,\% ($[94.4,99.1]$). All pairwise comparisons remain significant under McNemar's exact test with Bonferroni correction ($α= 0.01$; all $p < 10^{-5}$). The same fingerprint accounts for 4/4 errors on the held-out queries. Our interpretation is bounded: prompt framing can matter more than corrective content, and reasoner-guided wrappers should be ablated explicitly.
2604.23398.paper_summary_zh: 我們報告了在GPT-5.4上出現的可重複錯誤模式，針對OWL~2~DL合規查詢：當推理器推導的答案為「不」時，模型經常回答「未知」，這發生在\emph{FunctionalProperty}閉包或類別\emph{disjointness}下。使用從觀察到的模式的程序擴展中獲得的180個經過推理器審核的查詢，加上在兩個無關領域（保險和臨床）中手動編寫的18個保留查詢，我們在匹配的查詢預算下比較了四種互動模式：單次嘗試、三輪通用的「你錯了」重試、三輪帶有開放世界假設（OWA）提示的推理器判決修正，以及沒有提示的相同修正。直接的忠實度為43.9\,\%（Wilson 95\,\% CI $[36.8,51.2]$）；通用重試達到81.7\,\%（$[75.4,86.6]$）；帶提示的判決變體為\emph{更差}，為67.2\,\%（$[60.1,73.7]$）；僅判決變體達到97.8\,\%（$[94.4,99.1]$）。在進行Bonferroni修正的McNemar精確檢驗下，所有成對比較仍然顯著（$α= 0.01$；所有$p < 10^{-5}$）。相同的指紋解釋了在保留查詢中出現的4/4錯誤。我們的解釋是有限的：提示框架可能比修正內容更重要，並且應該明確去除推理器引導的包裝。
2604.23398.author: Yijiashun Qi et.al.
2604.23398.authors: Yijiashun Qi, Xiang Xu, Yuxuan Li
